description: Initial screen state showing instructions to share the screen.
frame_description: A dark screen with white text instructions for screen sharing.

description: Task instructions are typed out on the screen, detailing the flight booking scenario.
frame_description: The screen displays the full text of the user's task instructions.

description: An 'Open' button appears in the center of the screen.
frame_description: A circular button with the word 'Open' and an arrow icon is visible.

description: User clicks the 'Open' button.
frame_description: The 'Open' button is clicked by the user.

description: The browser navigates to the Flight Centre website.
page_title: Flights: Book & Fly with Flight Centre
frame_description: A new tab opens and the Flight Centre homepage loads.

description: Flight Centre homepage is fully loaded and interactive.
page_title: Flights: Book & Fly with Flight Centre
frame_description: The Flight Centre homepage is visible with the search widget and banners.

description: Hover over March 20 in the calendar modal
frame_description: The 'Travel dates' modal is open over the Flight Centre homepage, showing February and March 2026 calendars.

description: Click on March 20 to select departure date
frame_description: The date '20' is highlighted in the March 2026 calendar.

description: Modal title changes to 'Returning travel dates'
frame_description: The modal header now reads 'Returning travel dates'.

description: Horizontal content shift detected during date selection
frame_description: The user is interacting with the calendar modal.

description: The 'Hot flight deals for you!' carousel scrolls to the right.
frame_description: The carousel section of the page moves horizontally to the right.

description: Hover over March 22 in the calendar modal
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the date '22' in the March calendar.

description: Cursor hovers over the right navigation arrow of the flight deals carousel.
frame_description: The cursor is stationary over the right arrow button of the carousel.

description: Click on March 22 to select return date
frame_description: The date '22' is highlighted, and the range from 20 to 22 is shaded.

description: Calendar updates to show selected date range
frame_description: The selected dates are visually confirmed in the calendar UI.

description: Click 'Done' button in the date picker modal
frame_description: The cursor is over the blue 'Done' button at the bottom right of the modal.

description: Date picker modal closes
frame_description: The homepage search form is visible again with the selected dates populated.

description: Click 'Search flights' button
frame_description: The cursor activates the 'Search flights' button.

description: Navigate to flight search results page
page_title: Flight Centre | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Travel Insurance
frame_description: The page begins to load the search results.

description: Loading overlay appears: 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!'
frame_description: A white overlay with a blue loading spinner and text is visible.

description: Flight search results are displayed
frame_description: The 'Select Departing Flight' page is visible with several flight options.

description: Hover over a flight result card
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the price button of a Virgin Australia flight.

description: Click flight result to expand fare options
frame_description: The flight card expands downwards.

description: Fare types section expands
frame_description: Three fare columns are now visible within the flight result card.

description: Horizontal content shift detected during fare selection
frame_description: The user is selecting a fare type.

description: Click 'SELECT' for the Lite fare
frame_description: The cursor activates the 'SELECT' button under the 'Lite' fare column.

description: Transition overlay appears: 'Good choice!'
frame_description: A loading spinner is shown with the text 'Good choice! It's time to choose your flight for your return journey.'

description: Return flight results are displayed
frame_description: The 'Select Return Flight' page is now visible.

description: Hover over a return flight result
frame_description: The cursor lingers over a return flight option as the segment ends.

description: Click on the 12:10pm Virgin Australia flight price button.
frame_description: Flight results page showing multiple flight options for MEL to ADL.

description: Fare options section expands below the selected flight row.
frame_description: The flight row expands to reveal 'Select Returning Fare Type' with three columns: Lite, Choice, and Flex.

description: Click the 'SELECT' button for the Lite fare option.
frame_description: Cursor clicks the blue 'SELECT' button under the 'Lite' fare column.

description: Loading overlay 'All Set! Now let's review your flight selections...' appears.
frame_description: A white overlay with a blue spinner and the text 'All Set! Now let's review your flight selections...' covers the screen.

description: Navigation to the Review trip page.
frame_description: The 'Review trip' page loads, showing departing and returning flight details.

description: Scroll down the Review trip page.
frame_description: The page content moves upwards as the user scrolls down to see the 'Add-ons' section.

description: Hover over the 'SELECT' button for Priority Assistance.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'SELECT' button in the 'Online Captain's Pack' section.

description: Click the 'CONTINUE' button.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the green 'CONTINUE' button at the bottom right of the page summary.

description: Loading overlay 'Thanks for confirming your flights' appears.
frame_description: A white overlay with a spinner and the text 'Thanks for confirming your flights. Next up, your traveller details...' is displayed.

description: Navigation to the Travellers page.
frame_description: The 'Travellers' page loads, showing a form for passenger details.

description: Traveller details form fields appear.
frame_description: The form with fields for Title, First name, Last name, and Date of birth becomes visible.
